title: China’s Alibaba sends memo to employees after Qwen AI chief’s exit, says: We will set up new...
description: Alibaba Group Holding Ltd will establish a task force to accelerate development of its foundation AI models, following the resignation of Qwen AI division head Lin Junyang. According to a report by the news agency Reuters, the company has sent a letter to employees this week stating that the task force will coordinate AI efforts across the group and mobilise internal resources. This move comes as Alibaba advances its AI work through its Qwen model family. The memo said Alibaba Group CEO Eddie Wu, Group CTO Wu Zeming, and Alibaba Cloud CTO Zhou Jingren will coordinate the task force, pooling [...]

title: Anthropic introduces free AI courses with Claude training and certificates; all details here
description: US-based AI-startup ‘Anthropic’ has introduced a bunch of free learning platforms for beginners and advanced AI (Artificial Intelligence) learners. Seeing the rising demand for AI among Gen Z, this launch will provide structured courses on Claude, Anthropic’s AI model. This initiative will focus on areas such as AI fluency for general users, advanced prompting methods, and specialised developer tools, as Anthropic has mentioned. This will indirectly help the users in building their own AI applications. If someone wants to learn the basics of Claude in complex software workflows, then these modules will definitely help them sharpen their skills in AI [...]

title: Meta Opens WhatsApp To Rival AI Chatbots In Europe For A Fee
description: AI chatbots like ChatGPT, Claude AI, Perplexity, and others will be allowed on WhatsApp's Business API for fees for 12 months to ease EU scrutiny.

title: OpenAI launches Codex Security, an AI agent to fix code vulnerabilities
description: OpenAI has rebranded its autonomous security agent, Aardvark, as Codex Security and moved it into a research preview for tiered ChatGPT users. Read more...

title: Alphabet Faces Gemini Lawsuit While Deepening Healthcare AI Role With CVS
description: A wrongful death lawsuit has been filed against Alphabet (NasdaqGS:GOOGL), alleging its Gemini AI chatbot contributed to a user's suicide. The claim is reported to be the first legal case directly tied to Google's AI tools and their role in a death. At the same time, Alphabet announced a new healthcare AI partnership with CVS Health focused on a real time consumer engagement platform. Alphabet, the parent of Google and Gemini, is a central player in large scale consumer AI and cloud...
